title: 30 Bright Watercolour Birthday Cards with Envelopes made from Recycled Paper 30 Different Designs (30 Watercolour Birthday Cards)
features: 30 Bright Watercolour Birthday Cards with Envelopes made from Recycled Paper 30 Different Designs - Nice simple designs that are appropriate for almost anyones birthday.
The cards are nice and bright and have nice large bright pictures drawn on them in watercolour style.

The cards are printed on pearlescent cardstock which gives a lovely feel and slight shine/sparkle to them. They do make it slighly harder to write on so if you are planning on using a fountain pen these may not be the best option for you.
Thick 300GSM card. A6 (14.8cm x 10.5cm) when folded. The cards come with kraft brown envelopes made from recycled paper.
Great value set with 30 different designs so never send the same card to two different people. Or worse still the same card to the same person in different years!
description: Product Description the lazy panda card company Welcome to The Lazy Panda Card Company, where we take the stress out of sending smiles. We specialise in beautifully designed greeting cards and invitations that combine charm with quality, allowing you to celebrate life’s special moments with ease. Whether it’s an ethereal watercolour scene or a playful party invite, we’ve got you sorted. Sit back, relax, and leave the paper hugs to us. A Warm Greeting from Our Family to Yours The Lazy Panda Card Company is run by a small British family. We pour our hearts into designing unique, charming cards to help you share a little bit of calm and joy with the people you love this Christmas. We focus on quality and a friendly, personal service every step of the way. Quality You Can Feel At The Lazy Panda Card Company, we believe in the quiet joy of a truly beautiful card. We are run by a small family and are dedicated to conscious manufacturing , ensuring our unique, charming designs aren't mass-produced. When you choose our cards, you're choosing quality materials and a thoughtful approach. For greeting cards and stationary that stand out. Conscious, Natural Greeting Cards The Lazy Panda Card Company is run by a small family committed to doing things mindfully. Our products are focused on a natural feel , and we ensure our beautifully designed cards are made with the planet in mind, focusing on conscious manufacturing. Crucially, we never use plastic . Choose our lazy pandas for your festive messages and send a high-quality, truly natural greeting you can feel good about. Follow the Panda Family-Run & Personal Unique, Charming Designs Conscious & Plastic-Free Natural Feel & Quality Local Craftsmanship Bright Watercolour Birthday Cards Larger Animal Birthday Cards Larger Watercolours Animal Birthday Cards Funny Birthday Popular with Stickers Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 485 4.6 out of 5 stars 235 4.6 out of 5 stars 235 4.6 out of 5 stars 9 4.4 out of 5 stars 125 4.7 out of 5 stars 48 Price £8.95 £ 8 . 95 £9.95 £ 9 . 95 £9.95 £ 9 . 95 £9.95 £ 9 . 95 £8.95 £ 8 . 95 £14.95 £ 14 . 95 Number of Cards 30 20 20 30 30 50 With Envelopes ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Envelopes made from 100% Recycled Paper ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Heavy Cardstock ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ With Stickers or Seals no data no data no data no data no data ✓ Size when Folded 10 x 15cm 12 x 17cm 12 x 17cm 10 x 15cm 10 x 15cm 10 x 15cm Folding Cards ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ A Touch of Sparkle Our cards are lovingly crafted on thick, premium pearlescent cardstock . This beautiful finish creates a subtle shimmer that catches the light, much like freshly fallen snow. Because this smooth surface isn't standard paper, please take care to give your handwritten message an extra moment to dry.
